title: Departed Solmere
description: The party set out from Solmere at first light, supplies loaded and heading east.

title: Ambush on the Road
description: A band of Hollow-Eyed soldiers ambushed the party on the Ashen Road. Valvys took a bolt to the shoulder.

title: Met Silas the Informant
description: In the chaos after the ambush, a hooded figure approached. He claims to know where the Shardstone is being held.

title: Crossed Ashfen Crossing
description: Forded the Ashfen River at low tide. The horses struggled on the slick stones.

title: Siege of Varlen Keep
description: The party joined the defense of Varlen Keep against an extended assault by Hollow-Eyed forces. Three days of brutal fighting.

title: Ancient Shrine Discovered
description: Hidden beneath a collapsed tower, an intact shrine to an unnamed god. Ivory recognized the script as pre-Shattering.

title: Party Reached Level 5
description: After the siege, the party felt the unmistakable shift — new power settled into bone and breath.

title: Reached Willowshade Outskirts
description: The spire of Willowshade visible through the treeline. Camp made just outside the southern gate.

title: Letter from the Council
description: A wax-sealed letter arrived by falcon. The Council requests the party appear before them within a fortnight. No explanation given.
